(3) She relieved / soothed / eased her headache with / by means of / through (some) medicine last night. (4) To relieve / soothe / ease her headache, she took (some) medicine last night. (5) By taking (some) medicine, she relieved / soothed / eased her headache last night. (6) With / By means of / Through (some) medicine, she relieved/soothed / eased her headache last night. 評閱指標 級分 說明 能充分表達原文題意,對題材有絕佳的掌握, 4 句子結構及連貫性甚佳。文法及標點正確,用 字遣詞沒有或僅有極少不當之處。 能適切表達原文題意,對題材有良好的掌握, 3 句子結構及連貫性大致得當。文法及標點、用 字遣詞有少數不當之處,但不妨礙題意之表達。 僅能部分表達原文題意,句子結構不良或有 2 誤,且大多難以理解並缺乏連貫性。文法及標 點、用字遣詞有失當之處。 無法表達原文題意,句子沒有結構概念及連貫 1 性,無法理解。文法及標點、用字遣詞之錯誤 甚多。 (1) 空白 ( 未書寫文字 ) 。 (2) 文字瑣碎、形同未答。 0 (3) 只抄題目或其他試題。 (4) 內容完全離題或錯誤。

questions.q: Which of the following words is closest in meaning to the word “ range ” in the last paragraph?

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: According to the passage, which of the following statements is true?
options: One should measure a work of art on the basis of its aim.
Beauty in conventional sense is no longer acceptable nowadays.
Art that touches the intellect is less satisfactory than that touches the eye.
Most museum directors do not look at the art works before they are exhibited.
questions.explanation: 正解：(A)；來源：105-3-四技二專-英文解析.pdf

questions.subject: 英文
questions.q: Where can the passage most likely be found?

In an introduction to art for college students.
In a textbook for medical students.
questions.explanation: 正解：(C)；來源：105-3-四技二專-英文解析.pdf
